nasb.text: and, ‘On  their  hands they will bear You up, So that You will not strike Your foot against a stone.’ ”

esv.text: and “‘On their hands they will bear you up, lest you strike your foot against a stone.’”

cnv.text: 又記著： ‘用手托住你， 免得你的腳碰到石頭。’”

ccb.text: 他们会用手托住你，不让你的脚碰在石头上。’”

csbs.text: 他们会用手托住你， 免得你的脚撞在石头上。’  ”
